description_long: This ornate sconce features a circular arrangement of eight cylindrical white lampshades, each mounted on a delicately curved metal arm. The arms are intricately designed with scrollwork and decorative flourishes, converging at a central hub that is suspended from a chain and ceiling mount. The metal framework is finished in a light, possibly white or silver color, giving the fixture a refined and elegant appearance. Each lampshade likely conceals a bulb, and the overall structure is both symmetrical and balanced. The chain and ceiling plate are robust, supporting the weight of the fixture while adding to its decorative appeal. The sconce exudes a classic, vintage charm suitable for upscale urban interiors or historic public spaces.
description: An ornate, circular sconce with eight white cylindrical lampshades on decorative metal arms, suspended by a chain from a ceiling mount. The design features intricate scrollwork and a refined, vintage aesthetic.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full circular arrangement of eight lampshades and the detailed scrollwork of the metal arms.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view, still displaying the symmetrical layout and decorative elements, with a clearer perspective on the side arms.
description_view_2: Another rotated angle, highlighting the depth of the scrollwork and the even spacing of the lampshades around the central hub.
description_view_3: Similar to previous views, this angle emphasizes the uniformity of the design and the robust chain suspension.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture has a vintage, ornate design with classic scrollwork and symmetrical arms, evoking a sense of elegance and traditional craftsmanship. Its decorative elements and refined finish make it suitable for historic or upscale interiors.
